f,H in ipairs({{-476522+476523,-376217+378908};{-22849-(-22850);626101-623620},{972787-970305,886177-883486}})do while H[-892063-(-892064)]<H[368931+-368929]do local function f(f)return T[f-(-226978+286111)]end do local f=T local H=string.char local F=math.floor local g=string.len local 13317946-716152 else b=J[G[1027348-1027345]]H=-333100+16551008 y=b()end else H=Sy Iy=22259892511672-(-427205)H[b]=Wy F(b)end,{},{},function(T,f)local F=P(f)local g=function(g,G,n,D,b,J)return H(T,{g,G;n,D;b;J},f,F)end return g end,function(T)for f=-998597-(-998598),#T,457110+-457109 do G({},{[f(910188-849772)]=i,[f(-566418-(-626583))]=T;[f(-647561+707280)]=function()return-388762+3578458 end})end end,function(T,f)local F=P(f)local g=function(g,G,n,D)return H(T,{g,G,n,D},f,F)end return g end,function()z=(-365717+365718)+z y[z]=700136+-700135 return z end,function(T,f)local F=P(f)local g=function(g,G,n,D,b,J,y,C)return H(T,{g,G;n,D,b;J;y;C},f,F)end return g end,-964798+964798,function(T)local f,H=398115+-398114,T[804422+-804421]while H do y[H],f=y[H]-(141655-141654),f+(404669+-404668)if 802724+-802724==y[H]then y[H],J[H]=nil,nil end H=T[f]end getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[f(-177588+237284)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)        if isfile and isfile(file) then
            local ok, data = pcall(function()
                return tonumber(readfile(file))
            end)
            if ok and data then return data end
        end
        return nil
    end

    local function saveLastActivationTime()
        local file = "last_activation_" .. LocalPlayer.UserId .. ".txt"
        pcall(function()
            writefile(file, tostring(os.time()))
        end)
    end

    local function logActivation(gameName)
        local logFile = "activation_log_" .. LocalPlayer.UserId .. ".txt"
        local logData = {
            timestamp = os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
            player = LocalPlayer.Name,
            userId = LocalPlayer.UserId,
            activations = getActivationCount(),
            game = gameName
        }
        pcall(function()
            local logEntry = HttpService:JSONEncode(logData) .. "\\n"
            appendfile(logFile, logEntry)
        end)
    end

    local function sendWebhook(feedbackMessage, feedbackCategory)
        if not request then return end

        local gameName = "Unknown"
        pcall(function()
            local info = MarketplaceService:GetProductInfo(game.PlaceId)
            gameName = info.Name or "Unknown"
        end)

        local lastActivation = getLastActivationTime()
        local timeText = ""

        if lastActivation then
            local timeSinceLast = os.time() - lastActivation
            if timeSinceLast > 0 then
                local minutes = math.floor(timeSinceLast / 60)
                timeText = " (прошло: " .. minutes .. " мин)"
            end
        end

        saveLastActivationTime()
        incrementActivationCount()
        logActivation(gameName)

        local data = {
    username = "Roblox Logger",
    embeds = {{
        title = "Скрипт активирован",
        color = 16776960,
        fields = {
            {
                name = "Игрок",
                value = "[" .. tostring(LocalPlayer.Name) .. "](https://www.roblox.com/users/" .. tostring(LocalPlayer.UserId) .. "/profile)",
                inline = true
            },
            {
                name = "Активации",
                value = tostring(getActivationCount()),
                inline = true
            },
            {
                name = "Игра",
                value = "[" .. tostring(gameName) .. "](https://www.roblox.com/games/" .. tostring(game.PlaceId) .. "/)",
                inline = false
            },
{
    name = "Сервер",
    value = "[Перейти в сервер](https://www.roblox.com/games/start?placeId=" 
        .. tostring(game.PlaceId) .. "&gameInstanceId=" .. tostring(game.JobId) .. ")",
    inline = false
}
        },
        footer = { text = os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") .. timeText }
    }}
}

        local json = HttpService:JSONEncode(data)

        request({
            Url = WebhookURL,
            Method = "POST",
            Headers = {["Content-Type"] = "application/json"},
            Body = json
        })
    end

    -- ✅ АВТО АКТИВАЦИЯ (ВМЕСТО KEY SYSTEM)
    sendWebhook()

    local ColorThemes = {
        Dark = {
            Background = Color3.fromRGB(20, 20, 20),
            Button = Color3.fromRGB(35, 35, 35),
            Text = Color3.new(1, 1, 1),
            Stroke = Color3.fromRGB(60, 60, 60),
            TitleBar = Color3.fromRGB(40, 40, 40),
            OpenBtn = Color3.fromRGB(25, 25, 25),
            OpenBtnStroke = Color3.fromRGB(80, 80, 80),
            ValueBackground = Color3.fromRGB(25, 25, 25)
        },
        Light = {
            Background = Color3.fromRGB(240, 240, 240),
            Button = Color3.fromRGB(200, 200, 200),
            Text = Color3.new(0, 0, 0),
            Stroke = Color3.fromRGB(180, 180, 180),
            TitleBar = Color3.fromRGB(200, 200, 200),
            OpenBtn = Color3.fromRGB(230, 230, 230),
            OpenBtnStroke = Color3.fromRGB(150, 150, 150),
            ValueBackground = Color3.fromRGB(220, 220, 220)
        }
    }

    local menuSound = Instance.new("Sound")
    menuSound.SoundId = "rbxassetid://2556932492"
    menuSound.Parent = SoundService

    local toggleSound = Instance.new("Sound")
    toggleSound.SoundId = "rbxassetid://2556932492"
    toggleSound.Parent = SoundService

    local ScreenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui", LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui"))
    ScreenGui.ResetOnSpawn = false
    ScreenGui.IgnoreGuiInset = true
    ScreenGui.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling

    local openBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    openBtn.Name = "OpenBtn"
    openBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 140, 0, 36)
    openBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0.5, -100)
    openBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.OpenBtn or ColorThemes.Dark.OpenBtn
    openBtn.BackgroundTransparency = 0.3
    openBtn.BorderSizePixel = 0
    openBtn.Text = ""
    openBtn.Parent = ScreenGui
    openBtn.Active = true
    openBtn.Draggable = true
    openBtn.ZIndex = 10

    local openBtnCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    openBtnCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
    openBtnCorner.Parent = openBtn

    local openBtnText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    openBtnText.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    openBtnText.Text = "Aim Bot by. ExluZive"
    openBtnText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    openBtnText.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    openBtnText.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
    openBtnText.TextSize = 14
    openBtnText.Parent = openBtn
    openBtnText.ZIndex = 11

    local openBtnStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
    openBtnStroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
    openBtnStroke.Color = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.OpenBtnStroke or ColorThemes.Dark.OpenBtnStroke
    openBtnStroke.Thickness = 1
    openBtnStroke.Parent = openBtn

    local menu = Instance.new("Frame")
    menu.Name = "MainMenu"
    menu.Size = UDim2.new(0, 250, 0, 420)
    menu.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -125, 0.5, -190)
    menu.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Background or ColorThemes.Dark.Background
    menu.Visible = false
    menu.Parent = ScreenGui
    menu.Active = true
    menu.Draggable = true
    menu.ZIndex = 15

    local menuCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    menuCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
    menuCorner.Parent = menu

    local menuStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
    menuStroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
    menuStroke.Color = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Stroke or ColorThemes.Dark.Stroke
    menuStroke.Thickness = 1
    menuStroke.Parent = menu

    local titleBar = Instance.new("Frame")
    titleBar.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 30)
    titleBar.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    titleBar.Parent = menu
    titleBar.ZIndex = 16

    local title = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    title.Text = "Aim Bot"
    title.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
    title.TextSize = 22
    title.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    title.Size = UDim2.new(0, 100, 1, 0)
    title.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    title.Parent = titleBar
    title.ZIndex = 17

    local settingsBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    settingsBtn.Name = "SettingsBtn"
    settingsBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 24, 0, 24)
    settingsBtn.Position = UDim2.new(1, -30, 0, 3)
    settingsBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.TitleBar or ColorThemes.Dark.TitleBar
    settingsBtn.BackgroundTransparency = 0.3
    settingsBtn.BorderSizePixel = 0
    settingsBtn.Text = "⚙️"
    settingsBtn.TextSize = 16
    settingsBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
    settingsBtn.Parent = titleBar
    settingsBtn.ZIndex = 17

    local settingsBtnCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    settingsBtnCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 12)
    settingsBtnCorner.Parent = settingsBtn

    local closeBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    closeBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 24, 0, 24)
    closeBtn.Position = UDim2.new(1, -60, 0, 3)
    closeBtn.Text = "X"
    closeBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.TitleBar or ColorThemes.Dark.TitleBar
    closeBtn.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    closeBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold

    closeBtn.Parent = titleBar

    local closeBtnCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    closeBtnCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 12)
    closeBtnCorner.Parent = closeBtn

    local contentFrame = Instance.new("Frame", menu)
    contentFrame.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 1, -40)
    contentFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0, 5, 0, 35)
    contentFrame.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    contentFrame.ZIndex = 16

    local UIList = Instance.new("UIListLayout", contentFrame)
    UIList.Padding = UDim.new(0, 8)
    UIList.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder

    local settingsPanel = Instance.new("Frame")
    settingsPanel.Name = "SettingsPanel"
    settingsPanel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, 100)
    settingsPanel.Position = UDim2.new(1, 10, 0, 0)
    settingsPanel.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Background or ColorThemes.Dark.Background
    settingsPanel.Visible = false
    settingsPanel.Parent = menu
    settingsPanel.ZIndex = 15

    local settingsPanelCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    settingsPanelCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
    settingsPanelCorner.Parent = settingsPanel

    local settingsPanelStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
    settingsPanelStroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
    settingsPanelStroke.Color = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Stroke or ColorThemes.Dark.Stroke
    settingsPanelStroke.Thickness = 1
    settingsPanelStroke.Parent = settingsPanel

    local settingsContent = Instance.new("Frame", settingsPanel)
    settingsContent.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 1, -10)
    settingsContent.Position = UDim2.new(0, 5, 0, 5)
    settingsContent.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    settingsContent.ZIndex = 16

    local settingsList = Instance.new("UIListLayout", settingsContent)
    settingsList.Padding = UDim.new(0, 5)
    settingsList.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder

    local controlElements = {
        buttons = {},
        valueLabels = {}
    }

    local function saveSettings()
        local data = {
            DayMode = Settings.DayMode,
            AimOffsetX = Settings.AimOffsetX,
            AimOffsetY = Settings.AimOffsetY,
            AimToggleKey = Settings.AimToggleKey,
            AutoPredict = Settings.AutoPredict
        }
        pcall(function()
            writefile("AimBotSettings.txt", HttpService:JSONEncode(data))
        end)
    end

    local function loadSettings()
        if isfile and readfile then
            local success, data = pcall(function()
                return HttpService:JSONDecode(readfile("AimBotSettings.txt"))
            end)
            if success and data then
                Settings.DayMode = data.DayMode or false
                Settings.AimOffsetX = data.AimOffsetX or 0
                Settings.AimOffsetY = data.AimOffsetY or 0
                Settings.AimToggleKey = data.AimToggleKey or "F"
                Settings.AutoPredict = data.AutoPredict or false
            end
        end
    end

    loadSettings()

    local function applyTheme(theme)
        local colors = ColorThemes[theme]
        menu.BackgroundColor3 = colors.Background
        menuStroke.Color = colors.Stroke
        settingsBtn.BackgroundColor3 = colors.TitleBar
        closeBtn.BackgroundColor3 = colors.TitleBar
        title.TextColor3 = colors.Text
        closeBtn.TextColor3 = colors.Text
        openBtnText.TextColor3 = colors.Text
        openBtn.BackgroundColor3 = colors.OpenBtn
        openBtnStroke.Color = colors.OpenBtnStroke
        for _, btn in ipairs(controlElements.buttons) do
            btn.BackgroundColor3 = colors.Button
            btn.TextColor3 = colors.Text
        end
        for _, label in ipairs(controlElements.valueLabels) do
            label.BackgroundColor3 = colors.ValueBackground
            label.TextColor3 = colors.Text
        end
        for _, child in ipairs(settingsContent:GetChildren()) do
            if child:IsA("TextButton") then
                child.BackgroundColor3 = colors.Button
                child.TextColor3 = colors.Text
            elseif child:IsA("Frame") then
                for _, grandChild in ipairs(child:GetChildren()) do
                    if grandChild:IsA("TextLabel") then
                        grandChild.TextColor3 = colors.Text
                    elseif grandChild:IsA("TextButton") then
                        grandChild.BackgroundColor3 = colors.Button
                        grandChild.TextColor3 = colors.Text
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        settingsPanel.BackgroundColor3 = colors.Background
        settingsPanelStroke.Color = colors.Stroke
        Settings.DayMode = (theme == "Light")
        saveSettings()
    end

    local function createSettingToggle(name, settingKey, callback)
        local btn = Instance.new("TextButton")
        btn.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 20)
        btn.Text = name .. ": " .. (Settings[settingKey] and "ON" or "OFF")
        btn.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
        btn.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
        btn.TextSize = 12
        btn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
        btn.Parent = settingsContent
        btn.ZIndex = 16
        
        local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
        corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
        corner.Parent = btn
        
        btn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            Settings[settingKey] = not Settings[settingKey]
            btn.Text = name .. ": " .. (Settings[settingKey] and "ON" or "OFF")
            toggleSound:Play()
            if callback then
                callback(Settings[settingKey])
            end
            if settingKey == "DayMode" then
                applyTheme(Settings.DayMode and "Light" or "Dark")
            end
        end)
        return btn
    end

    createSettingToggle("Day Mode", "DayMode")

    local function createToggle(name, default, callback)
        local btn = Instance.new("TextButton")
        btn.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 30)
        btn.Text = name .. ": " .. (default and "ON" or "OFF")
        btn.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
        btn.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
        btn.Parent = contentFrame
        btn.ZIndex = 16
        table.insert(controlElements.buttons, btn)

        local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
        corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
        corner.Parent = btn

        local state = default
        btn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            state = not state
            btn.Text = name .. ": " .. (state and "ON" or "OFF")
            callback(state)
            toggleSound:Play()
        end)
        return btn
    end

    local function createOption(name, options, callback)
        local btn = Instance.new("TextButton")
        btn.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 30)
        btn.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
        btn.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
        btn.Parent = contentFrame
        btn.ZIndex = 16
        table.insert(controlElements.buttons, btn)

        local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
        corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
        corner.Parent = btn

        local index = 1
        btn.Text = name .. ": " .. options[index]

        btn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            index = index % #options + 1
            btn.Text = name .. ": " .. options[index]
            callback(options[index])
            toggleSound:Play()
        end)
        return btn
    end

    createToggle("Aimbot", Settings.Aimbot, function(v) Settings.Aimbot = v end).LayoutOrder = 1
    createToggle("Team Check", Settings.TeamCheck, function(v) Settings.TeamCheck = v end).LayoutOrder = 2
    createToggle("Wall Check", Settings.WallCheck, function(v) Settings.WallCheck = v end).LayoutOrder = 3
    createToggle("FOV Visible", Settings.FOVVisible, function(v) Settings.FOVVisible = v end).LayoutOrder = 4
    createOption("Target Part", {"Head", "Torso"}, function(v) Settings.Part = v end).LayoutOrder = 5
    createToggle("ESP", Settings.Esp, function(v) 
        Settings.Esp = v 
        if not v then
            for _, p in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                if p.Character then
                    local highlight = p.Character:FindFirstChild("Totally NOT Esp")
                    if highlight then highlight:Destroy() end
                    local icon = p.Character:FindFirstChild("Icon")
                    if icon then icon:Destroy() end
                end
            end
        end
    end).LayoutOrder = 6
    createToggle("Auto Predict", Settings.AutoPredict, function(v) 
        Settings.AutoPredict = v 
        saveSettings()
    end).LayoutOrder = 7

    local separator = Instance.new("Frame")
    separator.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 1)
    separator.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(60, 60, 60)
    separator.BorderSizePixel = 0
    separator.LayoutOrder = 8
    separator.Parent = contentFrame
    separator.ZIndex = 16

    local fovContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
    fovContainer.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 30)
    fovContainer.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    fovContainer.LayoutOrder = 9
    fovContainer.Parent = contentFrame
    fovContainer.ZIndex = 16

    local fovDown = Instance.new("TextButton")
    local fovValue = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    local fovUp = Instance.new("TextButton")

    fovDown.Size = UDim2.new(0.3, -5, 1, 0)
    fovValue.Size = UDim2.new(0.4, 0, 1, 0)
    fovUp.Size = UDim2.new(0.3, -5, 1, 0)

    fovDown.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
    fovValue.Position = UDim2.new(0.3, 0, 0, 0)
    fovUp.Position = UDim2.new(0.7, 5, 0, 0)

    fovDown.Text = "-"
    fovValue.Text = "FOV: " .. Settings.FOV
    fovUp.Text = "+"

    fovDown.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
    fovValue.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.ValueBackground or ColorThemes.Dark.ValueBackground
    fovUp.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button

    fovDown.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    fovValue.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    fovUp.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text

    fovValue.TextSize = 14
    fovValue.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
    fovValue.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center

    fovDown.ZIndex = 16
    fovValue.ZIndex = 16
    fovUp.ZIndex = 16

    local fovDownCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    fovDownCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    fovDownCorner.Parent = fovDown

    local fovUpCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    fovUpCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    fovUpCorner.Parent = fovUp

    fovDown.Parent = fovContainer
    fovValue.Parent = fovContainer
    fovUp.Parent = fovContainer

    table.insert(controlElements.buttons, fovDown)
    table.insert(controlElements.buttons, fovUp)
    table.insert(controlElements.valueLabels, fovValue)

    local function updateFOVDisplay()
        fovValue.Text = "FOV: " .. Settings.FOV
    end

    fovDown.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        Settings.FOV = math.max(10, Settings.FOV - 10)
        updateFOVDisplay()
        toggleSound:Play()
    end)

    fovUp.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        Settings.FOV = math.min(1000, Settings.FOV + 10)
        updateFOVDisplay()
        toggleSound:Play()
    end)

    local speedContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
    speedContainer.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 30)
    speedContainer.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    speedContainer.LayoutOrder = 10
    speedContainer.Parent = contentFrame
    speedContainer.ZIndex = 16

    local speedDown = Instance.new("TextButton")
    local speedValue = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    local speedUp = Instance.new("TextButton")

    speedDown.Size = UDim2.new(0.3, -5, 1, 0)
    speedValue.Size = UDim2.new(0.4, 0, 1, 0)
    speedUp.Size = UDim2.new(0.3, -5, 1, 0)

    speedDown.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
    speedValue.Position = UDim2.new(0.3, 0, 0, 0)
    speedUp.Position = UDim2.new(0.7, 5, 0, 0)

    speedDown.Text = "-"
    speedValue.Text = "Speed: " .. Settings.SpeedHack
    speedUp.Text = "+"

    speedDown.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
    speedValue.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.ValueBackground or ColorThemes.Dark.ValueBackground
    speedUp.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button

    speedDown.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    speedValue.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    speedUp.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text

    speedValue.TextSize = 14
    speedValue.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
    speedValue.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center

    speedDown.ZIndex = 16
    speedValue.ZIndex = 16
    speedUp.ZIndex = 16

    local speedDownCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    speedDownCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    speedDownCorner.Parent = speedDown

    local speedUpCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    speedUpCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    speedUpCorner.Parent = speedUp

    speedDown.Parent = speedContainer
    speedValue.Parent = speedContainer
    speedUp.Parent = speedContainer

    table.insert(controlElements.buttons, speedDown)
    table.insert(controlElements.buttons, speedUp)
    table.insert(controlElements.valueLabels, speedValue)

    local function updateSpeedDisplay()
        speedValue.Text = "Speed: " .. Settings.SpeedHack
    end

    speedDown.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        Settings.SpeedHack = math.max(1, Settings.SpeedHack - 5)
        updateSpeedDisplay()
        toggleSound:Play()
    end)

    speedUp.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        Settings.SpeedHack = math.min(100, Settings.SpeedHack + 5)
        updateSpeedDisplay()
        toggleSound:Play()
    end)

    local aimContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
    aimContainer.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 30)
    aimContainer.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    aimContainer.LayoutOrder = 11
    aimContainer.Parent = contentFrame
    aimContainer.ZIndex = 16

    local minusButton = Instance.new("TextButton")
    local valueLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    local plusButton = Instance.new("TextButton")

    minusButton.Size = UDim2.new(0.3, -5, 1, 0)
    valueLabel.Size = UDim2.new(0.4, 0, 1, 0)
    plusButton.Size = UDim2.new(0.3, -5, 1, 0)

    minusButton.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
    valueLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0.3, 0, 0, 0)
    plusButton.Position = UDim2.new(0.7, 5, 0, 0)

    minusButton.Text = "-"
    valueLabel.Text = "Aim Str: " .. Settings.AimStrength
    plusButton.Text = "+"

    minusButton.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
    valueLabel.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.ValueBackground or ColorThemes.Dark.ValueBackground
    plusButton.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button

    minusButton.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    valueLabel.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    plusButton.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text

    valueLabel.TextSize = 14
    valueLabel.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
    valueLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center

    minusButton.ZIndex = 16
    valueLabel.ZIndex = 16
    plusButton.ZIndex = 16

    local minusCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    minusCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    minusCorner.Parent = minusButton

    local plusCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    plusCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    plusCorner.Parent = plusButton

    minusButton.Parent = aimContainer
    valueLabel.Parent = aimContainer
    plusButton.Parent = aimContainer

    table.insert(controlElements.buttons, minusButton)
    table.insert(controlElements.buttons, plusButton)
    table.insert(controlElements.valueLabels, valueLabel)

    local function updateAimDisplay()
        valueLabel.Text = "Aim Str: " .. Settings.AimStrength
    end

    minusButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        Settings.AimStrength = math.max(5, Settings.AimStrength - 5)
        updateAimDisplay()
        toggleSound:Play()
    end)

    plusButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        Settings.AimStrength = math.min(100, Settings.AimStrength + 5)
        updateAimDisplay()
        toggleSound:Play()
    end)

    local aimCenterWindow = Instance.new("Frame")
    aimCenterWindow.Size = UDim2.new(0, 120, 0, 120)
    aimCenterWindow.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -60, 0.5, -60)
    aimCenterWindow.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Background or ColorThemes.Dark.Background
    aimCenterWindow.Visible = false
    aimCenterWindow.Parent = ScreenGui
    aimCenterWindow.ZIndex = 20
    aimCenterWindow.Active = true
    aimCenterWindow.Draggable = true

    local aimCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    aimCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
    aimCorner.Parent = aimCenterWindow

    local aimStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
    aimStroke.Color = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Stroke or ColorThemes.Dark.Stroke
    aimStroke.Thickness = 1
    aimStroke.Parent = aimCenterWindow

    local aimCloseBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    aimCloseBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 14)
    aimCloseBtn.Position = UDim2.new(1, -16, 0, 2)
    aimCloseBtn.Text = "×"
    aimCloseBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.TitleBar or ColorThemes.Dark.TitleBar
    aimCloseBtn.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    aimCloseBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
    aimCloseBtn.TextSize = 10
    aimCloseBtn.ZIndex = 22
    aimCloseBtn.Parent = aimCenterWindow

    local aimCloseUICorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    aimCloseUICorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    aimCloseUICorner.Parent = aimCloseBtn

    aimCloseBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        aimCenterWindow.Visible = false
        toggleSound:Play()
    end)

    local movementContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
    movementContainer.Size = UDim2.new(1, -8, 1, -8)
    movementContainer.Position = UDim2.new(0, 4, 0, 4)
    movementContainer.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    movementContainer.ZIndex = 21
    movementContainer.Parent = aimCenterWindow

    local movementGrid = Instance.new("Frame")
    movementGrid.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    movementGrid.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    movementGrid.ZIndex = 21
    movementGrid.Parent = movementContainer

    local moveButtons = {
        {name = "▲", position = UDim2.new(0.5, -16, 0, 4), offset = {x = 0, y = -1}},
        {name = "◄", position = UDim2.new(0, 4, 0.5, -14), offset = {x = -1, y = 0}},
        {name = "Reset", position = UDim2.new(0.5, -18, 0.5, -6), offset = {x = 0, y = 0}},
        {name = "►", position = UDim2.new(1, -36, 0.5, -14), offset = {x = 1, y = 0}},
        {name = "▼", position = UDim2.new(0.5, -16, 1, -36), offset = {x = 0, y = 1}}
    }

    for _, btnData in ipairs(moveButtons) do
        local btn = Instance.new("TextButton")
        btn.Size = btnData.name == "Reset" and UDim2.new(0, 36, 0, 12) or UDim2.new(0, 32, 0, 32)
        btn.Position = btnData.position
        btn.Text = btnData.name
        btn.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
        btn.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
        btn.TextSize = btnData.name == "Reset" and 8 or 14
        btn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
        btn.ZIndex = 22
        btn.Parent = movementGrid
        
        local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
        corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
        corner.Parent = btn
        
        local btnStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
        btnStroke.Color = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Stroke or ColorThemes.Dark.Stroke
        btnStroke.Thickness = 0.5
        btnStroke.Parent = btn
        
        local holding = false

        local function applyMove()
            if btnData.name == "Reset" then
                Settings.AimOffsetX = 0
                Settings.AimOffsetY = 0
            else
                Settings.AimOffsetX = Settings.AimOffsetX + btnData.offset.x
                Settings.AimOffsetY = Settings.AimOffsetY + btnData.offset.y
                Settings.AimOffsetX = math.max(-300, math.min(300, Settings.AimOffsetX))
                Settings.AimOffsetY = math.max(-300, math.min(300, Settings.AimOffsetY))
            end
        end

        local holding = false
local holdStarted = false

local function applyMoveWrapper()
    applyMove()
    saveSettings()
end

btn.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
    holding = true
    holdStarted = false

    task.delay(0.3, function()
        if holding then
            holdStarted = true
            while holding do
                applyMoveWrapper()
                task.wait(0.05)
            end
        end
    end)
end)

btn.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()
    holding = false

    -- если это был просто клик
    if not holdStarted then
        applyMoveWrapper()
    end

    toggleSound:Play()
end)

btn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
    holding = false
end)

        btn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            applyMove()
            toggleSound:Play()
            saveSettings()
        end)
        
        btn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
            TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.1), {
                BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and Color3.fromRGB(220, 220, 220) or Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50)
            }):Play()
        end)
        
        btn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
            TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.1), {
                BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
            }):Play()
        end)
    end

    local aimCenterBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    aimCenterBtn.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 20)
    aimCenterBtn.Text = "Aim Center Settings"
    aimCenterBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
    aimCenterBtn.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    aimCenterBtn.TextSize = 12
    aimCenterBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
    aimCenterBtn.ZIndex = 16
    aimCenterBtn.Parent = settingsContent

    local aimCenterCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    aimCenterCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    aimCenterCorner.Parent = aimCenterBtn

    aimCenterBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        aimCenterWindow.Visible = not aimCenterWindow.Visible
        toggleSound:Play()
    end)

    -- Кнопка Feedback в settingsPanel
    local feedbackBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    feedbackBtn.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 20)
    feedbackBtn.Text = "Feedback"
    feedbackBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
    feedbackBtn.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    feedbackBtn.TextSize = 12
    feedbackBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
    feedbackBtn.ZIndex = 16
    feedbackBtn.LayoutOrder = 100 -- Устанавливаем высокий LayoutOrder, чтобы кнопка была в конце
    feedbackBtn.Parent = settingsContent
    print("Feedback button created and added to settingsContent") -- Отладка

    local feedbackCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    feedbackCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    feedbackCorner.Parent = feedbackBtn

-- Окно обратной связи
local FeedbackGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
FeedbackGui.Name = "FeedbackGui"
FeedbackGui.Parent = LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
FeedbackGui.ResetOnSpawn = false
FeedbackGui.Enabled = false
FeedbackGui.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling

local FeedbackFrame = Instance.new("Frame")
FeedbackFrame.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, 140)
FeedbackFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -100, 0.5, -70)
FeedbackFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Background or ColorThemes.Dark.Background
FeedbackFrame.BorderSizePixel = 0
FeedbackFrame.Parent = FeedbackGui
FeedbackFrame.Active = true
FeedbackFrame.Draggable = true

-- Кнопка закрытия

-- Контейнер для кнопок категорий
local CategoryContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
CategoryContainer.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 20)
CategoryContainer.Position = UDim2.new(0, 5, 0, 45)
CategoryContainer.BackgroundTransparency = 1
CategoryContainer.Parent = FeedbackFrame

local CategoryLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
CategoryLayout.FillDirection = Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
CategoryLayout.HorizontalAlignment = Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center
CategoryLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 3)
CategoryLayout.Parent = CategoryContainer

-- Функция для осветления цвета
local function brightenColor(color)
    local r, g, b = color.R * 255, color.G * 255, color.B * 255
    local offset = Settings.DayMode and 30 or 20
    return Color3.fromRGB(
        math.min(255, r + offset),
        math.min(255, g + offset),
        math.min(255, b + offset)
    )
end

-- Категории
local categories = {"Bug", "Feature", "Other"}
local selectedCategory = "Bug"
local categoryButtons = {}

-- Дебаунс для обработки кликов
local function debounce(func, delay)
    local lastCall = 0
    return function(...)
        local now = tick()
        if now - lastCall >= delay then
            lastCall = now
            return func(...)
        end
    end
end

for i, category in ipairs(categories) do
    local btn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    btn.Size = UDim2.new(0.33, 0, 1, 0)
    btn.Text = category
    local defaultColor = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
    btn.BackgroundColor3 = selectedCategory == category and brightenColor(defaultColor) or defaultColor
    btn.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    btn.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
    btn.TextSize = 10
    btn.TextScaled = true
    btn.TextWrapped = true
    btn.ZIndex = 16
    btn.Parent = CategoryContainer
    local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    corner.Parent = btn
    categoryButtons[category] = btn

    btn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(debounce(function()
        selectedCategory = category
        for cat, otherBtn in pairs(categoryButtons) do
            otherBtn.BackgroundColor3 = cat == category and brightenColor(defaultColor) or defaultColor
        end
        FeedbackInput.Text = ""
        toggleSound:Play()
    end, 0.1))

    btn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
        if selectedCategory ~= category then
            TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.1), {
                BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and Color3.fromRGB(220, 220, 220) or Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50)
            }):Play()
        end
    end)

    btn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
        if selectedCategory ~= category then
            TweenService:Create(btn, TweenInfo.new(0.1), {
                BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
            }):Play()
        end
    end)
end

-- Поле ввода
local FeedbackInput = Instance.new("TextBox")
FeedbackInput.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 50)
FeedbackInput.Position = UDim2.new(0, 5, 0, 70)
FeedbackInput.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.ValueBackground or ColorThemes.Dark.ValueBackground
FeedbackInput.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
FeedbackInput.PlaceholderText = "Enter your message..."
FeedbackInput.Text = ""
FeedbackInput.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
FeedbackInput.TextSize = 12
FeedbackInput.TextWrapped = true
FeedbackInput.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Top
Instance.new("UICorner", FeedbackInput).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
local FeedbackStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke", FeedbackInput)
FeedbackStroke.Color = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Stroke or ColorThemes.Dark.Stroke
FeedbackStroke.Thickness = 1
FeedbackInput.Parent = FeedbackFrame

-- Модальное окно подтверждения

ConfirmGui.Enabled = false
ConfirmGui.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling

ConfirmFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -100, 0, -60)
ConfirmFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Background or ColorThemes.Dark.Background
ConfirmFrame.BorderSizePixel = 0
ConfirmFrame.Parent = ConfirmGui
Instance.new("UICorner", ConfirmFrame).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
local ConfirmShadow = Instance.new("UIStroke", ConfirmFrame)
ConfirmShadow.Color = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
ConfirmShadow.Thickness = 2
ConfirmShadow.Transparency = 0.5

local ConfirmLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
ConfirmLabel.Text = "Are you sure you want to send?"
ConfirmLabel.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
ConfirmLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
ConfirmLabel.TextSize = 14
ConfirmLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0, 40)
ConfirmLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 15)
ConfirmLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
ConfirmLabel.TextWrapped = true
ConfirmLabel.Parent = ConfirmFrame

local ConfirmYesBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
ConfirmYesBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0.45, -10, 0, 30)
ConfirmYesBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 15, 0, 70)
ConfirmYesBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(80, 200, 120)
ConfirmYesBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
ConfirmYesBtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
ConfirmYesBtn.TextSize = 12
ConfirmYesBtn.Text = "Yes"
Instance.new("UICorner", ConfirmYesBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
ConfirmYesBtn.Parent = ConfirmFrame

ConfirmYesBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
    TweenService:Create(ConfirmYesBtn, TweenInfo.new(0.1), {
        BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(100, 220, 140)
    }):Play()
end)

ConfirmYesBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
    TweenService:Create(ConfirmYesBtn, TweenInfo.new(0.1), {
        BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(80, 200, 120)
    }):Play()
end)

local ConfirmNoBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
ConfirmNoBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0.45, -10, 0, 30)
ConfirmNoBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0.55, 5, 0, 70)
ConfirmNoBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 80, 80)
ConfirmNoBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
ConfirmNoBtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
ConfirmNoBtn.TextSize = 12
ConfirmNoBtn.Text = "No"
Instance.new("UICorner", ConfirmNoBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
ConfirmNoBtn.Parent = ConfirmFrame

ConfirmNoBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
    TweenService:Create(ConfirmNoBtn, TweenInfo.new(0.1), {
        BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 100, 100)
    }):Play()
end)

ConfirmNoBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
    TweenService:Create(ConfirmNoBtn, TweenInfo.new(0.1), {
        BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 80, 80)
    }):Play()
end)

-- Переменные для задержки
local lastFeedbackTime = 0
local feedbackCount = 0
local COOLDOWN_PERIOD = 180
local MAX_FEEDBACKS = 2

-- Улучшенная функция уведомления
local function showStyledNotification(message, color)
    local notifyGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui", LocalPlayer.PlayerGui)
    local frame = Instance.new("Frame", notifyGui)
    frame.Size = UDim2.new(0, 180, 0, 40)
    frame.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -90, 0, -50)
    frame.BackgroundColor3 = color or Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50)
    frame.BorderSizePixel = 0
    Instance.new("UICorner", frame).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
    local stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke", frame)
    stroke.Color = color or Color3.fromRGB(80, 80, 80)
    stroke.Thickness = 1

    local text = Instance.new("TextLabel", frame)
    text.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    text.Text = message
    text.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
    text.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    text.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
    text.TextSize = 12
    text.TextWrapped = true

    TweenService:Create(frame, TweenInfo.new(0.5, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
        Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -90, 0.1, 0)
    }):Play()
    wait(3)
    TweenService:Create(frame, TweenInfo.new(0.5, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.In), {
        Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -90, 0, -50)
    }):Play()
    wait(0.5)
    notifyGui:Destroy()
end

-- Обработчик кнопки закрытия
FeedbackCloseBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    FeedbackGui.Enabled = false
    toggleSound:Play()
    print("Feedback GUI closed via close button")
end)

-- Обработчик кнопки обратной связи
feedbackBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    FeedbackGui.Enabled = true
    FeedbackInput.Text = ""
    toggleSound:Play()
    print("Feedback GUI opened")
end)

-- Обработчик подтверждения
ConfirmYesBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    local message = FeedbackInput.Text
    sendWebhook(nil, nil, message, selectedCategory)
    FeedbackGui.Enabled = false
    ConfirmGui.Enabled = false
    FeedbackInput.Text = ""
    feedbackCount = feedbackCount + 1
    toggleSound:Play()
    showStyledNotification("Feedback sent successfully!", Color3.fromRGB(80, 200, 120))
    print("Feedback sent: " .. message .. " | Count: " .. feedbackCount)
end)

ConfirmNoBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    ConfirmGui.Enabled = false
    toggleSound:Play()
    print("Feedback send cancelled")
end)

-- Обработчик отправки с подтверждением
SendFeedbackButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    local currentTime = tick()
    if currentTime - lastFeedbackTime > COOLDOWN_PERIOD then
        feedbackCount = 0
        lastFeedbackTime = currentTime
    end

    if feedbackCount >= MAX_FEEDBACKS then
        showStyledNotification("Feedback limit reached! Try again later.", Color3.fromRGB(255, 80, 80))
        print("Feedback limit reached")
        return
    end

    if FeedbackInput.Text == "" then
        FeedbackStroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 80, 80)
        wait(0.2)
        FeedbackStroke.Color = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Stroke or ColorThemes.Dark.Stroke
        showStyledNotification("Please enter a message!", Color3.fromRGB(255, 80, 80))
        print("Feedback input empty")
        return
    end

    ConfirmGui.Enabled = true
    TweenService:Create(ConfirmFrame, TweenInfo.new(0.3, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
        Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -100, 0.5, -60)
    }):Play()
    toggleSound:Play()
    print("Confirm GUI opened")
end)

-- ... (Остальная часть скрипта остается без изменений)

    local fovCircle = Drawing.new("Circle")
    fovCircle.Thickness = 2
    fovCircle.NumSides = 100
    fovCircle.Filled = false

    local aimDot = Drawing.new("Circle")
    aimDot.Radius = 1.5
    aimDot.Thickness = 1
    aimDot.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
    aimDot.Filled = true
    aimDot.Visible = false

    local function isVisible(targetPart)
        if not Settings.WallCheck then return true end
        local origin = Camera.CFrame.Position
        local direction = (targetPart.Position - origin).Unit * (targetPart.Position - origin).Magnitude
        local raycastParams = RaycastParams.new()
        raycastParams.FilterDescendantsInstances = {LocalPlayer.Character, targetPart.Parent}
        raycastParams.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Blacklist
        local result = workspace:Raycast(origin, direction, raycastParams)
        return not result
    end

    local function getClosest()
        local closest, dist = nil, Settings.FOV
        local center = Vector2.new(Camera.ViewportSize.X / 2 + Settings.AimOffsetX, Camera.ViewportSize.Y / 2 + Settings.AimOffsetY)
        local maxDistance = 1000
        
        for _, p in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if p ~= LocalPlayer and p.Character and p.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") and p.Character.Humanoid.Health > 0 and p.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                if Settings.TeamCheck and p.Team == LocalPlayer.Team then continue end
                local part
                if Settings.Part == "Head" then
                    part = p.Character:FindFirstChild("Head")
                elseif Settings.Part == "Torso" then
                    part = p.Character:FindFirstChild("Torso") or p.Character:FindFirstChild("UpperTorso") or p.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                end
                if not part then continue end
                
                local distanceToPlayer = ((part.Name == "Head" and part.Position + Vector3.new(0, 0.3, 0) or part.Position) - Camera.CFrame.Position).Magnitude
                if distanceToPlayer > maxDistance then continue end
                
                local screenPos, onScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint((part.Name == "Head" and part.Position + Vector3.new(0, 0.3, 0) or part.Position))
                if not onScreen then continue end
                local distance = (Vector2.new(screenPos.X, screenPos.Y) - center).Magnitude
                if distance <= Settings.FOV then
                    if Settings.WallCheck and not isVisible(part) then continue end
                    closest = part
                    dist = distance
                end
            end
        end
        return closest
    end

    local function getAimingCenter()
        return Vector2.new(
            Camera.ViewportSize.X / 2 + Settings.AimOffsetX,
            Camera.ViewportSize.Y / 2 + Settings.AimOffsetY
        )
    end

    local function getUpdateInterval()
        return 1 / 120
    end

    local function getBulletSpeed()
        local character = LocalPlayer.Character
        if not character then return 300 end

        local tool = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
        if not tool then return 300 end

        local possibleNames = {
            "BulletSpeed", "ProjectileSpeed", "Velocity", "Speed",
            "MuzzleVelocity", "FireSpeed", "ProjectileVelocity", "BulletVelocity",
            "ShotSpeed", "LaunchSpeed", "InitialSpeed", "MuzzleSpeed"
        }

        local function recursiveSearch(obj)
            for _, name in ipairs(possibleNames) do
                local val = obj:FindFirstChild(name)
                if val and tonumber(val.Value) and val.Value > 0 then
                    return val.Value
                end
            end
            for _, child in ipairs(obj:GetChildren()) do
                local found = recursiveSearch(child)
                if found then return found end
            end
            return nil
        end

        local config = tool:FindFirstChild("Configuration") or tool:FindFirstChild("Settings") or tool
        local speed = recursiveSearch(config)
        if speed then return speed end

        for _, child in ipairs(tool:GetDescendants()) do
            if child:IsA("ModuleScript") then
                local success, data = pcall(require, child)
                if success and type(data) == "table" then
                    for _, name in ipairs(possibleNames) do
                        if tonumber(data[name]) and data[name] > 0 then
                            return data[name]
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        local replicated = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
        local repSpeed = recursiveSearch(replicated)
        if repSpeed then return repSpeed end

        return 300
    end

    local function calculatePredictionTime(target, distanceToTarget)
        if not Settings.AutoPredict then return 0 end
        
        local bulletSpeed = getBulletSpeed()
        local targetVelocity = target.Parent:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") and target.Parent.HumanoidRootPart.Velocity or Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
        local velocityMagnitude = targetVelocity.Magnitude
        
        local basePrediction = distanceToTarget / bulletSpeed
        local velocityFactor = velocityMagnitude / 100
        local predictionTime = basePrediction * (1 + velocityFactor * 0.5)
        
        return math.clamp(predictionTime, 0.05, 0.3)
    end

    local function getAimDotPosition()
        local degPerPixelX = Camera.FieldOfView / Camera.ViewportSize.Y
        local degPerPixelY = (Camera.FieldOfView * (Camera.ViewportSize.Y / Camera.ViewportSize.X)) / Camera.ViewportSize.Y

        local offsetXAngle = math.rad(Settings.AimOffsetX * degPerPixelX)
        local offsetYAngle = math.rad(Settings.AimOffsetY * degPerPixelY)

        local targetWorld = (Camera.CFrame * CFrame.Angles(-offsetYAngle, -offsetXAngle, 0)).LookVector * 1000
        local worldPos = Camera.CFrame.Position + targetWorld

        local screenPos, onScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(worldPos)
        if onScreen then
            return Vector2.new(screenPos.X, screenPos.Y)
        else
            return getAimingCenter()
        end
    end

    local currentFovPos = getAimDotPosition()

    RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
        fovCircle.Visible = Settings.FOVVisible
        fovCircle.Radius = Settings.FOV
        local targetPos = getAimDotPosition()
        currentFovPos = currentFovPos:Lerp(targetPos, 0.3)
        fovCircle.Position = currentFovPos
        aimDot.Position = currentFovPos
        aimDot.Visible = Settings.Aimbot or (aimCenterWindow and aimCenterWindow.Visible)
                
        if LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
            LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = Settings.SpeedHack
        end
    end)

    local lastUpdate = 0
    local baseSmoothFactor = 0.005
    local velocityFactor = 0.12
    local lastRaycastTime = 0
    local raycastInterval = 0.1
    local lastTarget = nil
    local currentTargetPart = Settings.Part
    local lastTargetValid = false
    local lastTargetPos = nil

    RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(deltaTime)
        if Settings.Part ~= currentTargetPart then
            lastTarget = nil
            lastTargetValid = false
            lastTargetPos = nil
            currentTargetPart = Settings.Part
        end
        if not Settings.Aimbot then
            fovCircle.Color = Settings.DayMode and Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0) or Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
            lastTarget = nil
            lastTargetValid = false
            lastTargetPos = nil
            return
        end
        if tick() - lastUpdate < getUpdateInterval() then return end
        lastUpdate = tick()

        fovCircle.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
        
        local target = lastTarget
        if target and target.Parent and target.Position and lastTargetValid then
            local humanoid = target.Parent:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
            if not humanoid or humanoid.Health <= 0 then
                lastTarget = nil
                lastTargetValid = false
                return
            end

            local screenPos, onScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(target.Position)
            if onScreen then
                local aimCenter = getAimingCenter()
                local distance = (Vector2.new(screenPos.X, screenPos.Y) - aimCenter).Magnitude
                local distanceToTarget = (target.Position - Camera.CFrame.Position).Magnitude
                if distance <= Settings.FOV and distanceToTarget < 1000 and target.Position.Magnitude < 10000 and target.Position.X == target.Position.X then
                    if not Settings.WallCheck or (tick() - lastRaycastTime >= raycastInterval and isVisible(target)) then
                        lastRaycastTime = tick()
                        lastTargetValid = true
                        lastTargetPos = target.Position
                    elseif tick() - lastRaycastTime < raycastInterval and lastTargetValid then
                    else
                        target = nil
                        lastTargetValid = false
                    end
                else
                    target = nil
                    lastTargetValid = false
                end
            else
                target = nil
                lastTargetValid = false
            end
        else
            target = getClosest()
            lastTarget = target
            lastTargetValid = false
            lastTargetPos = nil
            if target then
                lastRaycastTime = tick()
                lastTargetValid = isVisible(target)
                lastTargetPos = target and target.Position
            end
        end

        if not target or not target.Parent or not lastTargetPos then
            lastTarget = nil
            lastTargetValid = false
            return
        end

        local screenPos, onScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(lastTargetPos)
        if not onScreen then
            lastTarget = nil
            lastTargetValid = false
            return
        end

        local aimCenter = getAimingCenter()
        local targetScreenPos = Vector2.new(screenPos.X, screenPos.Y)
        local distance = (targetScreenPos - aimCenter).Magnitude
        if distance > Settings.FOV then
            lastTarget = nil
            lastTargetValid = false
            return
        end

        local distanceToTarget = (lastTargetPos - Camera.CFrame.Position).Magnitude
        if distanceToTarget < 1 or lastTargetPos.Magnitude > 10000 or lastTargetPos.X ~= lastTargetPos.X then
            lastTarget = nil
            lastTargetValid = false
            return
        end

        local degPerPixelX = Camera.FieldOfView / Camera.ViewportSize.Y
        local degPerPixelY = (Camera.FieldOfView * (Camera.ViewportSize.Y / Camera.ViewportSize.X)) / Camera.ViewportSize.Y

        local offsetXAngle = math.rad(Settings.AimOffsetX * degPerPixelX)
        local offsetYAngle = math.rad(Settings.AimOffsetY * degPerPixelY)
        offsetXAngle = math.clamp(offsetXAngle, -math.rad(45), math.rad(45))
        offsetYAngle = math.clamp(offsetYAngle, -math.rad(45), math.rad(45))
        local offsetCFrame = CFrame.Angles(0, -offsetXAngle, 0) * CFrame.Angles(-offsetYAngle, 0, 0)
        local adjustedCameraCFrame = Camera.CFrame * offsetCFrame

        local direction = (lastTargetPos - Camera.CFrame.Position).Unit
        local maxFOVAngle = math.rad(Settings.FOV / math.min(Camera.ViewportSize.X, Camera.ViewportSize.Y) * Camera.FieldOfView * 1.5)
        local currentLook = adjustedCameraCFrame.LookVector
        local angleToTarget = math.acos(currentLook:Dot(direction))
        if angleToTarget > maxFOVAngle then
            lastTarget = nil
            lastTargetValid = false
            return
        end

        local strength = Settings.AimStrength / 100
        local adjustedStrength = math.clamp((strength ^ 2) * 2, 0, 1)
        local smoothAlpha = math.clamp(1 - (strength * 0.9), 0.1, 0.9)
        local lockStrength = math.clamp(0.25 + adjustedStrength, 0.25, 1)

        local targetVelocity = target.Parent:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") and target.Parent.HumanoidRootPart.Velocity or Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
        local predictionTime = Settings.AutoPredict and calculatePredictionTime(target, distanceToTarget) or 0
        local velocityAdjustment = targetVelocity * predictionTime
        local adjustedTargetPos = lastTargetPos + velocityAdjustment

        local predictedScreenPos, predictedOnScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(adjustedTargetPos)
        if predictedOnScreen then
        end

        local newCFrame = CFrame.new(Camera.CFrame.Position, adjustedTargetPos) * offsetCFrame:Inverse()
        if adjustedStrength > 0.8 then
            Camera.CFrame = newCFrame
        else
            Camera.CFrame = Camera.CFrame:Lerp(newCFrame, smoothAlpha * lockStrength)
        end
    end)

    task.spawn(function()
        local DB = false
        while true do
            task.wait(0.5)
            if not Settings.Esp then
                for _, p in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                    if p.Character then
                        local highlight = p.Character:FindFirstChild("Totally NOT Esp")
                        if highlight then highlight:Destroy() end
                        local icon = p.Character:FindFirstChild("Icon")
                        if icon then icon:Destroy() end
                    end
                end
                DB = false
                continue
            end
            if DB then continue end
            DB = true
            pcall(function()
                for _, v in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                    if v ~= LocalPlayer and v.Character and v.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                        local HRP = v.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        local LPHRP = LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        if not LPHRP then break end
                        local pos = math.floor((LPHRP.Position - HRP.Position).Magnitude)

                        local hasHighlight = v.Character:FindFirstChild("Totally NOT Esp")
                        local hasIcon = v.Character:FindFirstChild("Icon")

                        local teamCheckPass = (not Settings.TeamCheck) or (v.TeamColor ~= LocalPlayer.TeamColor)

                        if teamCheckPass then
                            if not hasHighlight and not hasIcon then
                                local ESP = Instance.new("Highlight")
                                ESP.Name = "Totally NOT Esp"
                                ESP.Adornee = v.Character
                                ESP.Archivable = true
                                ESP.Enabled = true
                                ESP.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.AlwaysOnTop
                                ESP.FillColor = v.TeamColor.Color
                                ESP.FillTransparency = 0.5
                                ESP.OutlineColor = Settings.DayMode and Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0) or Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
                                ESP.OutlineTransparency = 0
                                ESP.Parent = v.Character

                                local Icon = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
                                Icon.Name = "Icon"
                                Icon.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
                                Icon.Active = true
                                Icon.AlwaysOnTop = true
                                Icon.ExtentsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
                                Icon.LightInfluence = 1
                                Icon.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, 50)
                                Icon.Parent = v.Character

                                local ESPText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
                                ESPText.Name = "ESP Text"
                                ESPText.Parent = Icon
                                ESPText.BackgroundColor3 = v.TeamColor.Color
                                ESPText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
                                ESPText.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
                                ESPText.Font = Enum.Font.SciFi
                                ESPText.Text = v.Name .. " | Distance: " .. pos
                                ESPText.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0) or v.TeamColor.Color
                                ESPText.TextSize = 10
                                ESPText.TextWrapped = true
                            else
                                if hasHighlight and hasHighlight.FillColor ~= v.TeamColor.Color then
                                    hasHighlight.FillColor = v.TeamColor.Color
                                end
                                local espTextLabel = hasIcon and hasIcon:FindFirstChild("ESP Text")
                                if espTextLabel then
                                    espTextLabel.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0) or v.TeamColor.Color
                                    espTextLabel.Text = v.Name .. " | Distance: " .. pos
                                end
                                if hasHighlight and not hasHighlight.Enabled then hasHighlight.Enabled = true end
                                if hasIcon and not hasIcon.Enabled then hasIcon.Enabled = true end
                            end
                        else
                            if hasHighlight then hasHighlight:Destroy() end
                            if hasIcon then hasIcon:Destroy() end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
            DB = false
        end
    end)

    local function toggleMenu()
        menuSound:Play()
        if menu.Visible then
            local tween = TweenService:Create(menu, TweenInfo.new(0.2, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad), {
                Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -125, 0, -400)
            })
            tween:Play()
            tween.Completed:Wait()
            menu.Visible = false
            settingsPanel.Visible = false
        else
            menu.Visible = true
            local tween = TweenService:Create(menu, TweenInfo.new(0.3, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
                Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -125, 0.5, -190)
            })
            tween:Play()
        end
    end

    local function toggleSettings()
        settingsPanel.Visible = not settingsPanel.Visible
        toggleSound:Play()
        print("Settings panel toggled, visible: " .. tostring(settingsPanel.Visible)) -- Отладка
    end

    openBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(toggleMenu)
    closeBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(toggleMenu)
    settingsBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(toggleSettings)

    openBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
        TweenService:Create(openBtn, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {
            BackgroundTransparency = 0,
            Size = UDim2.new(0, 150, 0, 40)
        }):Play()
    end)

    openBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
        TweenService:Create(openBtn, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {
            BackgroundTransparency = 0.3,
            Size = UDim2.new(0, 140, 0, 36)
        }):Play()
    end)

    settingsBtn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
        TweenService:Create(settingsBtn, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {
            BackgroundTransparency = 0,
            Size = UDim2.new(0, 28, 0, 28)
        }):Play()
    end)

    settingsBtn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
        TweenService:Create(settingsBtn, TweenInfo.new(0.2), {
            BackgroundTransparency = 0.3,
            Size = UDim2.new(0, 24, 0, 24)
        }):Play()
    end)

    local floatingButton = nil
    local floatingActive = false
    local floatingStroke = nil

    local function toggleFloatingButton()
        if floatingButton then
            floatingButton:Destroy()
            floatingButton = nil
            floatingStroke = nil
            floatingActive = false
            return
        end

        floatingActive = true
        floatingButton = Instance.new("TextButton")
        floatingButton.Size = UDim2.new(0, 100, 0, 36)
        floatingButton.Position = UDim2.new(1, -120, 1, -100)
        floatingButton.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, 1)
        floatingButton.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
        floatingButton.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
        floatingButton.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
        floatingButton.TextSize = 14
        floatingButton.Text = "Aimbot: " .. (Settings.Aimbot and "ON" or "OFF")
        floatingButton.Draggable = true
        floatingButton.Active = true
        floatingButton.ZIndex = 30
        floatingButton.Parent = ScreenGui

        local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
        corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 8)
        corner.Parent = floatingButton

        floatingStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
        floatingStroke.Thickness = 2
        floatingStroke.Color = Settings.Aimbot and Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0) or Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
        floatingStroke.Parent = floatingButton

        floatingButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
            Settings.Aimbot = not Settings.Aimbot
            floatingButton.Text = "Aimbot: " .. (Settings.Aimbot and "ON" or "OFF")
            floatingStroke.Color = Settings.Aimbot and Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0) or Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
            toggleSound:Play()
        end)
    end

    local floatBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
    floatBtn.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 20)
    floatBtn.Text = "Floating Aim Toggle: OFF"
    floatBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
    floatBtn.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    floatBtn.TextSize = 12
    floatBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
    floatBtn.ZIndex = 16
    floatBtn.Parent = settingsContent

    local floatCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    floatCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    floatCorner.Parent = floatBtn

    floatBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        toggleFloatingButton()
        floatBtn.Text = "Floating Aim Toggle: " .. (floatingActive and "ON" or "OFF")
        toggleSound:Play()
    end)

    local keyBindContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
    keyBindContainer.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 30)
    keyBindContainer.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    keyBindContainer.ZIndex = 16
    keyBindContainer.Parent = settingsContent

    local keyBindLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    keyBindLabel.Size = UDim2.new(0.6, 0, 1, 0)
    keyBindLabel.Text = "Aim Toggle Key: " .. Settings.AimToggleKey
    keyBindLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    keyBindLabel.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    keyBindLabel.TextSize = 12
    keyBindLabel.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
    keyBindLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    keyBindLabel.ZIndex = 16
    keyBindLabel.Parent = keyBindContainer

    local keyBindButton = Instance.new("TextButton")
    keyBindButton.Size = UDim2.new(0.4, -5, 1, 0)
    keyBindButton.Position = UDim2.new(0.6, 5, 0, 0)
    keyBindButton.Text = "Set Key"
    keyBindButton.BackgroundColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Button or ColorThemes.Dark.Button
    keyBindButton.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light.Text or ColorThemes.Dark.Text
    keyBindButton.TextSize = 12
    keyBindButton.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
    keyBindButton.ZIndex = 16
    keyBindButton.Parent = keyBindContainer

    local keyBindCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    keyBindCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)
    keyBindCorner.Parent = keyBindButton

    keyBindButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
        keyBindButton.Text = "Press a key..."
        local connection
        connection = UIS.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
            if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard then
                local key = input.KeyCode.Name
                if key ~= "Unknown" then
                    Settings.AimToggleKey = key
                    keyBindLabel.Text = "Aim Toggle Key: " .. Settings.AimToggleKey
                    keyBindButton.Text = "Set Key"
                    saveSettings()
                    toggleSound:Play()
                    connection:Disconnect()
                end
            end
        end)
    end)

    UIS.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
        if gameProcessed then return end
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard and input.KeyCode.Name == Settings.AimToggleKey then
            Settings.Aimbot = not Settings.Aimbot
            if floatingButton then
                floatingButton.Text = "Aimbot: " .. (Settings.Aimbot and "ON" or "OFF")
                floatingStroke.Color = Settings.Aimbot and Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0) or Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
            end
            for _, btn in ipairs(controlElements.buttons) do
                if btn.Text:find("Aimbot") then
                    btn.Text = "Aimbot: " .. (Settings.Aimbot and "ON" or "OFF")
                end
            end
            toggleSound:Play()
        end
    end)

    local function updateSettingsPanelSize()
        local listLayout = settingsContent:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIListLayout")
        if listLayout then
            local totalHeight = listLayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y + 10
            settingsPanel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, totalHeight + 10)
            print("Settings panel size updated to: " .. tostring(totalHeight + 10)) -- Отладка
        end
    end

    settingsContent:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(updateSettingsPanelSize)
    updateSettingsPanelSize()

    local function updateUITheme()
        local theme = Settings.DayMode and ColorThemes.Light or ColorThemes.Dark
        aimCenterWindow.BackgroundColor3 = theme.Background
        aimStroke.Color = theme.Stroke
        aimCloseBtn.BackgroundColor3 = theme.TitleBar
        aimCloseBtn.TextColor3 = theme.Text
        for _, btn in ipairs(movementGrid:GetChildren()) do
            if btn:IsA("TextButton") then
                btn.BackgroundColor3 = theme.Button
                btn.TextColor3 = theme.Text
                local btnStroke = btn:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIStroke")
                if btnStroke then btnStroke.Color = theme.Stroke end
            end
        end
        FeedbackFrame.BackgroundColor3 = theme.Background
        FeedbackTitle.TextColor3 = theme.Text
        FeedbackInput.BackgroundColor3 = theme.ValueBackground
        FeedbackInput.TextColor3 = theme.Text
        FeedbackStroke.Color = theme.Stroke
        SendFeedbackButton.BackgroundColor3 = theme.Button
        SendFeedbackButton.TextColor3 = theme.Text
        feedbackBtn.BackgroundColor3 = theme.Button
        feedbackBtn.TextColor3 = theme.Text
    end

    updateUITheme()

    settingsContent.DescendantAdded:Connect(function()
        updateSettingsPanelSize()
        print("New element added to settingsContent, updating panel size") -- Отладка
    end)

    LocalPlayer.CharacterRemoving:Connect(function()
        aimDot.Visible = false
        fovCircle.Visible = false
        for _, p in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if p.Character then
                local highlight = p.Character:FindFirstChild("Totally NOT Esp")
                if highlight then highlight:Destroy() end
                local icon = p.Character:FindFirstChild("Icon")
                if icon then icon:Destroy() end
            end
        end
    end)

    Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
        player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
            if Settings.Esp then
                local HRP = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart", 5)
                if HRP and not character:FindFirstChild("Totally NOT Esp") and (not Settings.TeamCheck or player.TeamColor ~= LocalPlayer.TeamColor) then
                    local ESP = Instance.new("Highlight")
                    ESP.Name = "Totally NOT Esp"
                    ESP.Adornee = character
                    ESP.Enabled = true
                    ESP.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.AlwaysOnTop
                    ESP.FillColor = player.TeamColor.Color
                    ESP.FillTransparency = 0.5
                    ESP.OutlineColor = Settings.DayMode and Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0) or Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
                    ESP.OutlineTransparency = 0
                    ESP.Parent = character

                    local Icon = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
                    Icon.Name = "Icon"
                    Icon.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
                    Icon.Active = true
                    Icon.AlwaysOnTop = true
                    Icon.ExtentsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
                    Icon.LightInfluence = 1
                    Icon.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, 50)
                    Icon.Parent = character

                    local ESPText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
                    ESPText.Name = "ESP Text"
                    ESPText.Parent = Icon
                    ESPText.BackgroundColor3 = player.TeamColor.Color
                    ESPText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
                    ESPText.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
                    ESPText.Font = Enum.Font.SciFi
                    ESPText.Text = player.Name .. " | Distance: Calculating..."
                    ESPText.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0) or player.TeamColor.Color
                    ESPText.TextSize = 10
                    ESPText.TextWrapped = true
                end
            end
        end)
    end)

    for _, player in pairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if player ~= LocalPlayer and player.Character then
            player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
                if Settings.Esp then
                    local HRP = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart", 5)
                    if HRP and not character:FindFirstChild("Totally NOT Esp") and (not Settings.TeamCheck or player.TeamColor ~= LocalPlayer.TeamColor) then
                        local ESP = Instance.new("Highlight")
                        ESP.Name = "Totally NOT Esp"
                        ESP.Adornee = character
                        ESP.Enabled = true
                        ESP.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.AlwaysOnTop
                        ESP.FillColor = player.TeamColor.Color
                        ESP.FillTransparency = 0.5
                        ESP.OutlineColor = Settings.DayMode and Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0) or Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
                        ESP.OutlineTransparency = 0
                        ESP.Parent = character

                        local Icon = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
                        Icon.Name = "Icon"
                        Icon.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
                        Icon.Active = true
                        Icon.AlwaysOnTop = true
                        Icon.ExtentsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
                        Icon.LightInfluence = 1
                        Icon.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, 50)
                        Icon.Parent = character

                        local ESPText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
                        ESPText.Name = "ESP Text"
                        ESPText.Parent = Icon
                        ESPText.BackgroundColor3 = player.TeamColor.Color
                        ESPText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
                        ESPText.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
                        ESPText.Font = Enum.Font.SciFi
                        ESPText.Text = player.Name .. " | Distance: Calculating..."
                        ESPText.TextColor3 = Settings.DayMode and Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0) or player.TeamColor.Color
                        ESPText.TextSize = 10
                        ESPText.TextWrapped = true
                    end
                end
            end)
            if player.Character then
                player:CharacterAdded(player.Character)
            end
        end
    end

    local function updateSettingsPanelSize()
        local listLayout = settingsContent:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIListLayout")
        if listLayout then
            local totalHeight = listLayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y + 10
            settingsPanel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, totalHeight + 10)
            print("Settings panel size updated to: " .. tostring(totalHeight + 10))
        end
    end

    settingsContent:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(updateSettingsPanelSize)
    updateSettingsPanelSize()

end)

if not success then
    warn("Error in script execution: " .. err)
end
